resources.string: A source matrix is found intact beneath ancient dust
SOURCE MATRIX RECOVERED FROM ANCIENT DUST

The pilgrimage fleet found the derelict drifting cold in the deep dark. Beneath dust thick enough to bury centuries, a data wafer still held one uncorrupted path into the ancient database. Decryption advanced by single luminous marks, and the bridge crew wept when a perfect source matrix answered. Six ships had been lost in transit; the margin note calls the price modest.
ORIGIN PILGRIMAGE. DERELICT HULL FOUND IN DEEP SPACE. DATA CHIPS CLEANED. ANCIENT DATABASE DECRYPTION REACHED ONE PERFECT LINE. THE FLEET LOSS WAS ACCEPTABLE.
